mechanism: Metformin inhibits mitochondrial complex I → shifts metabolism toward anaerobic glycolysis → lactate accumulation. At therapeutic doses, hepatic lactate clearance compensates. In renal failure (eGFR < 30), metformin accumulates → clearance overwhelmed → type B lactic acidosis. Mortality ~50% once established.

contextualModifiers.effect: metformin accumulation due to impaired renal clearance

sourceSnippet: KDIGO CKD 2024; FDA label update 2016; StatPearls Metformin
